tasks.label: Electron: start on real desktop
tasks.command: desktop_pid=$(pgrep -u "$USER" -n plasmashell || pgrep -u "$USER" -n gnome-shell || pgrep -u "$USER" -n xfce4-session || pgrep -u "$USER" -n cinnamon-session) && if [[ -z "$desktop_pid" ]]; then echo "No local desktop session process found for $USER"; exit 1; fi && while IFS='=' read -r key value; do case "$key" in DISPLAY|WAYLAND_DISPLAY|XAUTHORITY|XDG_RUNTIME_DIR|DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS|XDG_SESSION_TYPE|DESKTOP_SESSION) export "$key=$value" ;; esac; done < <(tr '\0' '\n' < "/proc/$desktop_pid/environ") && ./node_modules/.bin/cross-env NODE_ENV=development ./node_modules/.bin/electron-forge start
